allow: PowerShell(\(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; \(Get-Command npx -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; \(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)
PowerShell(Get-Command node.exe,npm.cmd,npx.cmd -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name,Source; $env:PATH -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ -match 'node|npm' })
